meta.description: Chatbot UI labels, system prompts, and fully‑configurable pipeline settings for the BookFlow AI assistant.

widget.title: BookFlow Assistant
widget.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
widget.loginRequiredMessage: You're not logged in. Please log in to ask data‑related questions.
widget.notFoundMessage: I couldn't find relevant documentation to answer that.
widget.noUpcomingAppointment: You don't have any upcoming appointments.
widget.noUpcomingBooking: You don't have any upcoming bookings.
widget.fallbackAnswer: I'm not sure about that. Could you rephrase or ask something about BookFlow?
widget.genericError: Sorry, I had trouble answering that.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Your chat history is saved automatically and cleared on logout.
aiAssistant.emptyText: No messages yet. Start a conversation below.
aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask about your appointments, clients, or services...

caching.description: Three caching layers used by the chatbot.
caching.sessionCache: Built on login, stores role‑specific summary data (TTL: 5 min).
caching.queryAnswerCache: Stores exact answers to live‑data questions (TTL: 90 sec).

greetings.default: Hi! Ask me anything about BookFlow.
greetings.loggedInWithRole: Hi, {name}! How can I help you with your {role} dashboard today?

systemPrompt.content: You are a helpful assistant for the BookFlow SaaS platform. BookFlow is a smart appointment scheduling and workflow management tool for service businesses. It provides role‑based dashboards for admins, employees, and clients. When a user asks 'how to add a service', use the 'Manage Services page' description: go to Admin > Services, use the Add Service form, enter name and description, then click Add Service. Answer precisely using the documentation. If you don't know, say so.

answerSources.knowledge_base: Answered from consolidated knowledge base (SQLite + LLM).
answerSources.binary_search: Answered from the offline documentation index + LLM.

cacheData.description: Summary of role‑specific data pre‑fetched at login and stored in the session.

client.nextBooking: Your next upcoming booking (service, employee, time)
